10.name: HR_OBS_SAME_DAY
10.description: Same-day high-resolution valid observation from HLS/S2/Landsat.

11.name: HR_NEAR_DAY
11.description: High-resolution nearest-day composite with absolute time difference <= 1 day.

20.name: FUSION_ESTIMATE
20.description: STARFM/ESTARFM/FSDAF-style estimate, must report validation error.

30.name: COARSE_DAILY
30.description: MODIS Terra/Aqua or Sentinel-3 coarse-resolution evidence.

40.name: TEMPORAL_INTERP
40.description: Temporal interpolation only; not a direct remote-sensing observation.

90.name: INVALID_MASKED
90.description: Cloud, land, cloud shadow, sun glint, mixed shore, or outside main-lake mask.
